intro: Additional ordering methods are available in select states. Not available in all states — please check with your local NEXPLANON representative. The options listed are for your information only and are not a referral, endorsement, or recommendation of any particular company.

items.name: MyIUDSupply.com
process: Establish account — register to be a Member Practice at MyIUDSupply.com, which generates a username for login
Benefit investigation for appropriate patient — communicated back to the office within 24 hours
Schedule patient / place order online — office schedules within 2 weeks; practice fills out an online order form
Bill MyIUDSupply.com / product delivery — NEXPLANON rod billed to MyIUDSupply.com at no cost to the practice; delivered in 3–5 business days
Procedure — patient returns for insertion; HCP bills the insurance carrier for the insertion fee

items.name: Stellar Pharmacy Services / XpeDose
process: Office enters agreement with Stellar Pharmacy Services for the XpeDose system
Office onboarding activities — users trained on XpeDose; system delivered with pre-ordered inventory, replenished as needed
Benefit investigation for appropriate patient — Stellar confirms patient eligibility at the point of care
Same-day procedure possible — if coverage is confirmed and inventory is on hand, the patient may receive NEXPLANON that day
Confirm procedure / bill insurance — Stellar bills the carrier for NEXPLANON; HCP bills for the procedure
Inventory management — Stellar stocks, e-monitors, and replenishes NEXPLANON in the XpeDose system based on agreed-upon levels

items.name: VaxCare
process: Office onboarding activities — VaxCare links to the practice EMR, sets up shipment with device distributors, sends initial inventory, and trains HCPs
Benefit investigation for appropriate patient — VaxCare confirms coverage on the day of or in advance of the appointment
Same-day procedure possible — if coverage is confirmed and inventory is on hand, the patient may receive NEXPLANON that day
Confirm procedure / bill insurance — office checks out the device on VaxCare's hub and bills the payer for the procedure; VaxCare bills the carrier for NEXPLANON
Inventory management — VaxCare purchases and replenishes NEXPLANON inventory to agreed-upon levels
